criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance the shopping experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer information, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Overall user satisfaction and ease of use of the app.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: Number of downloads and active users.

criteria.name: Price Comparison
criteria.description: Effectiveness in comparing prices across different retailers.
